candidates.why: Primary operating top-line revenue; clearly labeled and matches target definition of total revenue/sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue; excluded in favor of Total Revenue.
Interest income, not revenue from operations.

Interest income from associates, not operating revenue.

candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue (already net of many expenses).

candidates.row_label: Total recognized income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not a revenue line.

variables.notes: Revenue is clearly reported as 'Total Revenue'; no need to consider financial or comprehensive income lines.

candidates.why: Direct production/input costs; best representation of cost of goods sold.
Likely includes both production and overhead labor; less precise for pure COGS than raw materials.
Broad operating expenses including overhead; not strictly COGS.
Overhead/operating cost, not direct cost of goods sold.
Selling expense (SG&A), not COGS.
Likely miscellaneous operating overhead; not clearly direct COGS.
Explicit SG&A bucket, should be excluded from COGS.
Net operating result including multiple components; not a pure COGS line.
Financing item, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing-related, not production cost.
Balance sheet stock of raw materials, not period expense.
Balance sheet item; not COGS.
Accrued liabilities; not a P&L COGS line.

variables.notes: Direct material and consumable usage is the clearest proxy for COGS; SG&A and financial items are excluded.

candidates.why: Personnel-related operating expenses; typical SG&A component but may also include production staff.
Broad overhead/operating expenses; SG&A-like bucket.
Additional other operating expense bucket; also SG&A-like.
Explicit SG&A aggregation line; preferred single SG&A measure per instructions.
Share-based compensation, typically part of SG&A.
Balance sheet item (liability/equity component) relating to share-based pay, not current period expense.

variables.notes: An explicit, populated 'Selling, General Administrative Expenses' line exists, so per hierarchy only this row is used for XSGA_COMPONENTS.
No research & development-related line items (e.g., R&D, research, development) appear in the provided income statement or balance sheet; XRD is treated as absent/zero.

candidates.why: Earnings before interest and taxes; not an interest expense line.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense on debt and leases; main XINT component.

Additional interest costs not captured above; secondary XINT source.
Refers to minority shareholders, not interest expense.
Refers to minority shareholders, not interest expense.
Refers to equity holders, not interest expense.
Profit allocation, not financing cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on bank borrowings and leasing
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: XINT is represented by the detailed interest expense lines related to bank borrowings and lease liabilities, plus other interest expenses; a generic 'Interest Expense' and a supplemental lease interest line are included as fallbacks in priority order.

candidates.row_label: Profit attributable to equity holders of the parent company

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity instruments
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.
Specific financial assets, not total book equity.
A major component of equity but not total equity itself.
Sub-component of equity; not total equity attributable to owners.
Total equity including any non-controlling interests; acceptable fallback if no separate parent-equity line existed.

variables.notes: The most appropriate BE measure is equity attributable to owners/parent. The balance sheet provides 'Total controlling interests', which matches this concept but is not in the candidate list. It is preferred over 'Total Equity', which may include non-controlling interests in some periods. Please confirm that 'Total controlling interests' indeed represents equity attributable to owners of the parent. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Total controlling interests

candidates.why: Income statement profit attributable to non-controlling interests; not the balance sheet stock but confirms presence of minorities.
Alternative labeling of non-controlling interests on the income statement.
Profits attributable to controlling shareholders, not minorities.
Income statement allocation to NCI, not the balance sheet amount.
Balance sheet line for minority interests; primary MIB measure.
Alternative balance sheet label for non-controlling interests, useful if populated in other periods.

variables.notes: MIB is mapped to the balance sheet non-controlling interest lines; both label variants are provided as priority options in case only one is populated in a given period.
